summary: Verification attempt 1 passed. Spexus current_context was read before task access, task PERSONAL-TASK-1159 was read, and current_context was read again before the PERSONAL-EP-180 hierarchy. All listed dependency reports were present and valid JSON. Accepted dependency reports for MZ-402 through MZ-406 were risk-free; the prior MZ-406 failed report was reviewed only as regression context and the focused fix plus orchestrator visual rerun closed that visual gap. Source and tests for scoring, settlement, UI result rendering, controller behavior, final completion guard, and US-844 integration were inspected. Focused US-844 verification passed 64 tests, full npm run verify passed 126 tests and production build, and the MZ-406 desktop/laptop screenshots plus capture script support visual regression readiness. No expanded stats or visible full deal history were added beyond the approved score, current/previous deal result, final ranking/result summary, and existing compact in-game log surfaces.

tests_run.evidence: All listed dependency, prior-failure, focused-fix, and visual-rerun reports parsed as valid JSON.

tests_run.command: source inspection: src/domain/scoring.ts, src/domain/scoring.test.ts, src/domain/state.ts, src/domain/engine.ts, src/domain/engine.test.ts, src/ui/render.ts, src/ui/render.test.ts, src/ui/controller.ts, src/ui/controller.test.ts, src/test/us844Scoring.integration.test.ts
tests_run.evidence: Reviewed the required scoring, state, engine, renderer, controller, and integration surfaces for US-844 behavior and owner scope.

tests_run.command: source inspection: output/playwright/mz406-capture.mjs; manual inspection of output/playwright/mz-406-active-desktop.png, mz-406-active-laptop.png, mz-406-settlement-desktop.png, mz-406-settlement-laptop.png, mz-406-final-desktop.png, mz-406-final-laptop.png
tests_run.evidence: Capture script renders active, settlement, and final synthetic score/result states at 1280x800 and 1024x768. Screenshots show readable score cards, settlement result layout without the prior horizontal clipping, final ranking/result summary, and no continuation buttons in final state.
Confirmed required MZ-406 screenshot artifacts exist at 1280x800 desktop and 1024x768 laptop sizes.

tests_run.command: npm run test -- src/domain/scoring.test.ts src/domain/engine.test.ts src/ui/render.test.ts src/ui/controller.test.ts src/test/us844Scoring.integration.test.ts
tests_run.evidence: Vitest passed 5 files and 64 tests covering scoring model, engine settlement/completion, renderer score/result UI, controller behavior, and US-844 integration.
Vitest passed 13 files and 126 tests. Production build passed with tsc and vite build.

verification_environment.notes: The build command refreshed dist artifacts as part of the required npm run verify release gate. No production source files were edited.

evidence_matrix.scenario: The scoring engine maintains bullet, mountain, and directed mutual-whist values for all three players, and the UI displays those current values in the score table.
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: src/domain/state.ts Score; src/domain/scoring.ts settleDealResult/applyWhists/applyScoreDelta; src/ui/render.ts scoreboardMarkup; src/domain/scoring.test.ts; src/ui/render.test.ts; npm run test -- src/domain/scoring.test.ts src/domain/engine.test.ts src/ui/render.test.ts src/ui/controller.test.ts src/test/us844Scoring.integration.test.ts
evidence_matrix.limitations: Evidence is local deterministic domain/UI regression coverage for a static browser app, not DOS-authentic formula proof.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Deal settlement calculates structured before/delta/after result data; final bullet completion calculates deterministic ranking/result summary and exposes it to the renderer.
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: src/domain/scoring.ts settleDealResult/calculateFinalResult; src/domain/engine.ts applySettlementAction; src/ui/render.ts renderDealResultPanel/renderFinalResultPanel; src/domain/engine.test.ts; src/test/us844Scoring.integration.test.ts; npm run verify
evidence_matrix.limitations: Final settlement ranking follows the documented MVP contract from dependency reports rather than claiming exact original MARRIAGE formula equivalence.

evidence_matrix.scenario: When a deal completes, deal-settlement exposes the pending result, settleDeal atomically updates score totals, next-deal preserves previousDealResult, and the UI shows score table plus deal result details.
evidence_matrix.limitations: Visual evidence uses deterministic synthetic fixtures rendered through the app capture script; full mobile remains outside MVP scope.

evidence_matrix.req_or_ac_or_contract: PERSONAL-AC-2427 bullet target final result/no continuation
evidence_matrix.scenario: When bullet target is reached, settlement transitions to finished state, finalResult is present, getLegalActions returns no actions, and the rendered final result has no settleDeal/startNextDeal continuation controls.
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: src/domain/engine.ts getLegalActions/applySettlementAction; src/domain/engine.test.ts finished-state test; src/ui/render.test.ts finished-state no-continuation test; src/test/us844Scoring.integration.test.ts final-result test; output/playwright/mz-406-final-desktop.png; output/playwright/mz-406-final-laptop.png
evidence_matrix.limitations: No server/live API applies because the product is a static local browser game.

evidence_matrix.req_or_ac_or_contract: owner-scope contract: no expanded stats or visible full deal history
evidence_matrix.scenario: US-844 adds only the compact current score panel, current/previous deal result panel, and final ranking/result summary. Saved technicalDealHistory remains persistence/debug state and is not rendered as a full visible deal list.
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: src/ui/render.ts scoreboardMarkup/renderDealResultPanel/renderFinalResultPanel; src/persistence/saveStore.ts technicalDealHistory; rg review for history/stat/result surfaces; docs/test-design/us-844-bullet-scoring.md owner-scope notes
evidence_matrix.limitations: The pre-existing compact in-game log panel remains visible as Ход партии, but it is not a full past-deal history surface and was not expanded for US-844.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Accepted dependency reports are risk-free, the prior MZ-406 visual failure is closed by accepted attempt 2 and rerun evidence, focused US-844 tests pass, full verify passes, and visual artifacts cover active/settlement/final states at desktop and laptop sizes.
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: dependency report review; jq empty listed reports; npm run test -- src/domain/scoring.test.ts src/domain/engine.test.ts src/ui/render.test.ts src/ui/controller.test.ts src/test/us844Scoring.integration.test.ts; npm run verify; output/playwright/mz-406-*.png; output/playwright/mz406-capture.mjs
evidence_matrix.limitations: Visual review is screenshot/metric evidence rather than pixel-diff baseline; full mobile adaptation is explicitly out of scope.

quality_gate_matrix.command_or_source: src/domain/scoring.ts; src/domain/scoring.test.ts; src/domain/engine.test.ts; src/test/us844Scoring.integration.test.ts; focused 64-test run; npm run verify
quality_gate_matrix.limitations: MVP scoring contract is verified; exact DOS-authentic settlement formulas remain outside the approved claim.
Settlement laptop content is vertically scrollable within the panel at 1024x768, but no horizontal clipping or incoherent overlap remains.

quality_gate_matrix.command_or_source: src/domain/engine.ts getLegalActions returns [] for finished; src/domain/engine.test.ts; src/ui/render.test.ts; src/test/us844Scoring.integration.test.ts; output/playwright/mz-406-final-desktop.png; output/playwright/mz-406-final-laptop.png
quality_gate_matrix.limitations: Verified at domain and renderer layers; no backend applies.
Screenshots cover desktop/laptop only, matching the MVP desktop-first scope.
This regression verifier referenced MZ-405 accessibility evidence and reran renderer/controller tests; it did not perform a separate manual screen-reader pass.

quality_gate_matrix.command_or_source: PERSONAL-EP-180 static Vite/localStorage scope; reviewed US-844 scoring/UI surfaces
quality_gate_matrix.limitations: No server, account, auth, network, payment, or sensitive-data boundary is introduced by US-844 scoring/result UI.

quality_gate_matrix.command_or_source: risk-free accepted dependency reports; npm run verify; focused US-844 test command; visual evidence from MZ-406 accepted rerun and local screenshot inspection
quality_gate_matrix.limitations: No feature flag or rollback mechanism applies to the static MVP; release readiness is based on green tests/build, dependency report closure, and screenshot review.
